cards.title: Inbox Triage Pipeline
cards.body: Route incoming Gmail threads by intent — sales, support, vendor, noise — using a classifier with a short custom prompt tuned to your team's voice. High-signal threads get auto-labeled and pushed into Slack with a one-line summary; low-signal gets archived. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd wire the classifier to respect your existing label taxonomy so nothing retrains your muscle memory.

cards.title: Cross-Tool Data Sync
cards.body: Keep HubSpot, Airtable, and your finance system in agreement without anyone copy-pasting. A scheduled job reconciles records every 15 minutes, flags conflicts to a #ops-sync Slack channel, and writes an audit row to a Postgres log so you can prove what changed and when.

cards.title: Monthly Reporting Pipeline
cards.body: Pull numbers from Stripe, Google Analytics, and your CRM into a templated Notion doc on the first of each month — same sections, same charts, same commentary slots waiting for your take. No more 'who owns the Monday report' thread at 8pm the night before.
cards.metric: Reports shipped in 20 min vs. half a day

ctaLine: Typical build is 2–3 weeks for an ops team of 5–20. Book a scoping call and we'll tell you within 30 minutes whether this is worth doing.
